title: Version not bumped for release (1.1.0 with 40 commits since v1.1.0 tag)
evidence: pyproject.toml version=1.1.0 + ocman/cli.py:208 __version__=1.1.0; git rev-list origin/main..HEAD=40
impact: Shipping without a bump would collide with the released v1.1.0
recommended_action: Bump to 1.2.0 (minor; new features no breaking) in both places; cut CHANGELOG [Unreleased]->[1.2.0]

title: secret-scan CI would flag 6 synthetic AWS-key-shaped test fixtures (empty .gitleaksignore)
evidence: gitleaks detect over 348 commits -> 6 leaks all in tests/test_ocman.py (aws-access-token); confirmed synthetic fixtures for ocman's own secret-redaction tests (e.g. 'Here is my aws token AKIA... on this line'); .gitleaksignore is empty; .github/workflows/secret-scan.yml runs gitleaks over full history
impact: Pushing would likely turn the secret-scan CI job red on known false positives
recommended_action: Baseline the 6 gitleaks fingerprints in .gitleaksignore (they are test fixtures, NOT live secrets -> nothing to rotate/purge)
validation: gitleaks detect exits clean after baseline

title: No published vistab version both has set_color and imports on Python 3.12 (CI red)
evidence: CI on pushed HEAD 1f0467c failed: vistab.py:2617 'def ...-> Set[int]:' raises NameError 'Set' on py3.12 (broken published vistab 1.2.0). ocman requires vistab.set_color() which does NOT exist in 1.1.3 (AttributeError in 6 tests) -> needs >=1.2.0. Fixed vistab is 1.2.1 (installed locally) but NOT on PyPI (PyPI latest = 1.2.0). So a clean 'pip install ocman' fails import on py3.12.
impact: A clean install / CI fails on Python 3.12 (and any eager-annotation interpreter); release cannot go green as-is
recommended_action: Publish the fixed vistab 1.2.1 to PyPI (maintainer action; vistab is a sibling project), then set ocman dep to vistab>=1.2.1; re-run CI. Interim: cannot resolve via ocman constraint alone.
artifact_updates: pyproject.toml (after vistab 1.2.1 is published) + the vistab project
validation: CI green on py3.12 after vistab>=1.2.1
next_step: HAND OFF to maintainer: publish vistab 1.2.1
